description_long: This is a ceramic mug with a white handle and rim, featuring a dark exterior adorned with a vivid, colorful graphic artwork. The mug has a cylindrical body and a smoothly curved handle attached to one side, allowing for easy gripping. The interior of the mug is plain white, contrasting with the detailed and visually striking exterior design. The artwork appears to depict a dynamic scene or character, with splashes of red, blue, and other colors, and some visible text. The mug is shown resting on a flat, light purple rectangular surface, with a shadow and a faint reflection visible beneath it. The overall finish of the mug is glossy, giving it a polished and reflective appearance.
description: A glossy ceramic mug with a white handle and rim, featuring a dark, colorful graphic artwork on its exterior. The interior is plain white, and the mug has a polished, reflective finish.
description_view_0: The mug is seen from the side, highlighting the handle and a portion of the colorful artwork, with a visible strip of text.
description_view_1: The mug is viewed from the top of the handle, showing the circular base and the handle's attachment, with minimal artwork visible.
description_view_2: The mug is angled to show more of the graphic artwork and the handle, with the rim and part of the interior visible.
description_view_3: The mug is viewed from above, displaying the open white interior and the handle, with a clear view of the rim and a reflection on the surface below.
